'''makobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:myalgia|myalgia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myalgia|myalgia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| makobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mækebeth|mækebeth]] || [[word:mækebej|mækebej]] || [[word:mækebesh|mækebesh]] || [[word:mækebe|mækebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:makokoboth|makokoboth]] || [[word:makokoboj|makokoboj]] || [[word:makokobosh|makokobosh]] || [[word:makokobo|makokobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:makoboth|makoboth]] || [[word:makoboj|makoboj]] || [[word:makobosh|makobosh]] || [[word:makobo|makobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:makofboth|makofboth]] || [[word:makofboj|makofboj]] || [[word:makofbosh|makofbosh]] || [[word:makofbof|makofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:makobotho|makobotho]] || [[word:makobojo|makobojo]] || [[word:makobosho|makobosho]] || [[word:makoboko|makoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:makoboth|makoboth]] || [[word:makoboj|makoboj]] || [[word:makobosh|makobosh]] || [[word:makobo|makobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:makobothol|makobothol]] || [[word:makobojol|makobojol]] || [[word:makoboshol|makoboshol]] || [[word:makobokol|makobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:makobothotho|makobothotho]] || [[word:makobojojo|makobojojo]] || [[word:makoboshosho|makoboshosho]] || [[word:makoboko|makoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:makobothon|makobothon]] || [[word:makobojon|makobojon]] || [[word:makoboshon|makoboshon]] || [[word:makobokon|makobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:makobothoro|makobothoro]] || [[word:makobojoro|makobojoro]] || [[word:makoboshoro|makoboshoro]] || [[word:makobokoro|makobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
